title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates:
Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare Asia Pacific Associates!
